name: Slack Enterprise MCP
description: Enterprise Slack integration with compliance audit trails. Every action is logged for governance. Requires SLACK_BOT_TOKEN env var.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or thread. Every message is audit-logged

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search messages across the entire Slack workspace. Supports Slack search

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: List Slack channels with member counts and topics. Types can be

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Get a full thread with all replies. Provide the channel ID and the

tools.name: create_channel
tools.description: Create a new Slack channel. Name must be lowercase, no spaces (use hyphens).

tools.name: set_channel_topic
tools.description: Update the topic of a Slack channel. Provide channel ID or name.

tools.name: get_audit_log
tools.description: Return the audit trail of all MCP actions performed through this server.

tools.name: summarize_channel
tools.description: Get the last N messages from a channel and provide a structured summary.
